title: digitaria pruriens var. microbachne
intro: Digitaria pruriens var. microbachne, also known as the 'itchy grass' or 'itch weed', is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are utilized in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Digitaria pruriens var. microbachne include its ability to treat skin conditions such as itching, eczema, and dermatitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tincture, infusion, or topical ointment, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
